issue.title: [sync] dockerfile infer sync mode not working as expected
issue.body: Skaffold sync cannot infer sync mode from Dockerfile in a Kubernetes workflow. Steps to reproduce: run skaffold dev with the provided Dockerfile and edit a synced file. Expected behavior: inferred sync mode updates the container. Suggested fix: update Dockerfile sync inference and add integration tests.

repository.description: Kubernetes and Docker developer workflow tool

reasons: Direct Docker/Kubernetes issue with concrete validation path.

issue.title: [DX] dockerize Go app into Dockerfile for testing and production
issue.body: Create Dockerfile.local and production Dockerfile for a Go backend app. Expected behavior: developers can run the API in Docker and CI can build the production image. Suggested fix: add multi-stage Dockerfile and document validation.

reasons: Strong DevOps fallback candidate from global search.

issue.title: CI should fail when Kubernetes manifest fixture drifts from generated output
issue.body: Generated Kubernetes manifest fixtures can drift without CI catching it. Steps to reproduce: change generator output and run tests. Expected behavior: CI fails with a fixture diff. Suggested fix: add manifest snapshot validation in the CI job.

issue.title: [Good First Issue] Add Azure OpenAI provider support
issue.body: Add Azure OpenAI provider support to a drawing generator. Expected behavior: users can configure Azure endpoint and key.

issue.title: add the post-render option to the helm deploy
issue.body: Implement the --post-render flag in helm deploy so kustomize can be used after helm rendering.

repository.description: Kubernetes and Docker developer workflow tool

comments.body: I'd actually recommend holding off on this for the time being because we're working on major rendering and deployment changes.

reasons: Maintainer hold-off guidance should keep the issue out of the feed.

issue.title: Verify On-Chain Transaction Before Marking Payout as Completed
issue.body: The payout worker currently marks a PayoutTransaction as completed as soon as ConfirmationStatusFinalized is detected. Update processPayoutRequest in payout_worker.go to fetch the confirmed transaction, parse postBalances and preBalances, and verify the amount before marking the payout complete.

reasons: Blockchain prototype issue is outside DevOps/infra profile.

issue.title: Browser extension will not show TOTP autofill on Web Vault with non-English locale
issue.body: Bitwarden browser extension TOTP autofill is missing for non-English Web Vault locale. Steps to reproduce: switch locale and open Web Vault. Expected behavior: autofill still appears.

repository.description: Password manager web, desktop, browser and CLI clients

reasons: Browser localization issue should not fill DevOps/infra ranking.

issue.title: Set up Storybook for component documentation
issue.body: Set up Storybook as the component documentation and visual testing foundation for the UI kit. Install Storybook with Vite, document base components, and add npm scripts.

reasons: Storybook component documentation has no container, deploy, CI, Kubernetes, Docker, or infrastructure evidence.

issue.title: [DX] dockerize Go app into Dockerfile for testing (Dockerfile.local) and production (Dockerfile)
issue.body: Right now the Go server runs without Docker. The app is deployed on Digital Ocean App Platform. Add a prod Dockerfile and a test/local Dockerfile to make the project portable and easier to run locally.

reasons: Old low-impact Dockerfile task should not be the DevOps front page.
